response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile engineer with nearly two decades of experience, but his profile does not match this C++-centric industrial role. His only professional C++ work was a seven-month stint at National Instruments ending in 2015, and C++ does not even appear in his skills list; his systems-level strengths are in DLang and his recent years are TypeScript/Node.js product work. He shows no exposure to MQTT, industrial protocols, IEC 62443, or Secure Development Lifecycle practices, all of which are core to this position, and his experience length also overshoots the 8-12 year target band.
strengths: Genuine low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) from Sociomantic, albeit in DLang
Event-driven architecture and geo-platform work plus broad full-stack range including Node.js and Ember/React-adjacent frameworks
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, code katas, Selenium courses)
concerns: Minimal and stale professional C++/STL experience — roughly seven months, ending in 2015
No industrial automation, IoT protocol (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus), or IEC 62443 / SDL security background
Recent work is web/product-focused TypeScript, far from networked multi-threaded C++ platform development
